theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) - Vintage Travel Poster Variation
theme_and_archetype.vibe: Handcrafted, nostalgic, warm, trustworthy, and heavily editorial.

typography.install_instructions: Add Google Fonts imports for Playfair Display, Work Sans, and IBM Plex Mono in index.css

cards.style: Flat solid background (#EBE4D8), sharp 0px border-radius, with an inner 1px border (#D1C7B8) spaced 8px from the edge to mimic a vintage print frame.
cards.shadow: No modern drop shadows. Use a solid 4px offset shadow (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#2A2624]) for interactive elements.

calculator_widget.style: Ticket stub aesthetic. Cream background, dashed or dotted border-b to separate sections, monospaced typography for numbers, highly structured layout.
calculator_widget.inputs: Shadcn components heavily customized: flat backgrounds, sharp corners, bottom-border only (like a fill-in-the-blank form) or subtle outlines. No focus rings, use solid background color change on focus.

textures.global: Apply a very subtle CSS noise/grain overlay across the entire page (pointer-events-none, mix-blend-multiply, opacity 3%).

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing. Editorial asymmetrical bento grids. Use optical alignment.
layout_and_spacing.hero: Split 60/40 layout. Left side: Massive typography, tightly packed. Right side: Bleed image or framed artwork. Or a full-width immersive parallax poster with heavy typography overlay.

motion_and_interactions.global: Lenis smooth scrolling is highly recommended for premium momentum feel.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Buttons and cards should use a brutalist 'press' effect: translate-y-[2px] translate-x-[2px] and reduce the solid drop-shadow offset.
motion_and_interactions.reveals: Staggered fade-up for gallery and cards. Slow easing (duration-700 ease-out).

navigation.style: Sticky top, glassmorphism disabled. Solid cream background with a 1px bottom border. Monospaced tiny links.

hero.elements: Overline (mono), Massive Title (Playfair), Subtitle (Work Sans), Primary CTA (Solid Primary Color, Sharp Edges).

calculator.structure: Destination search (input), Duration (slider/number), Traveler Style (dropdown/radio cards). Real-time total cost updates. Breakdown visualization using Recharts (stacked bar or simple list with monospace alignment).

traveler_styles.structure: 5 tall rectangular cards (Backpacker, Family, Couple, Luxury, Adventure). Hover reveals example budget and description.

footer.style: Massive typography (text-[8vw] leading-none), dark background (Secondary/Deep Pine Green) with cream text. Newsletter input styled like a vintage telegram form.

images.description: Scattered vintage stamps on textured paper, use for backgrounds or opacity overlays

testing_guidelines.requirements: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, sliders, tabs) MUST have a data-testid attribute. Use kebab-case and role-based naming (e.g., data-testid='calc-submit-btn', data-testid='style-backpacker-card').
